message:
test(proptest): expand splay_tree (32), adaptive_radix_tree (31), rope (33) property tests (ft-283h4.52)

Added new property-based tests covering:
- splay_tree: clone equivalence/independence, display, default, peek/get consistency,
  double remove, overwrite, min/max after remove, remove-all, reinsert, serde after remove
- adaptive_radix_tree: string API parity (insert_str/get_str/remove_str/contains_str/prefix_search_str),
  multiple removes, double remove, display, default, overwrite, remove-all, serde roundtrip
- rope: concat method, clone independence, split+concat roundtrip, node_count, display,
  default, From<String>, insert-at-boundaries, line content matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
